context.audience: Developers building API products for other developers, startup teams creating API wrappers around AI services, backend engineers designing scalable public APIs
pain_points: Designing RESTful or GraphQL APIs that developers actually enjoy using
Rate limiting, authentication, and usage metering for API products
API documentation that stays in sync with the actual implementation
Versioning strategies that don't break existing consumers
Pricing models for API products based on usage, tiers, or features
content_that_works: API authentication and rate limiting tutorials
